business_view.audience: Advanced Guild Wars 2 players who need account progression, wealth, crafting, build, and goal decisions.
core_loop: Normalize holdings from wallet, materials, bank, characters, shared inventory, and trading post
Apply market prices and liquidity quality
Compare build, crafting, and legendary gaps

entity_axis.name: AccountContents
entity_axis.meaning: Raw normalized account snapshot from GW2 API permissions.

entity_axis.name: ItemHolding
entity_axis.meaning: Owned item or currency with location, tradability, binding, price, and valuation fields.

entity_axis.name: ValuationResult
entity_axis.meaning: Account wealth summary, warnings, top items, and breakdowns.

entity_axis.name: RecipeOptimizationResult
entity_axis.meaning: Craft versus buy decision, recursive steps, costs, and missing materials.

entity_axis.name: BuildTemplate
entity_axis.meaning: Curated build target with profession, gear, traits, and skills.

entity_axis.name: AccountBuildReadiness
entity_axis.meaning: How close an account is to a build, including missing items and cost.

entity_axis.name: GoalPlan
entity_axis.meaning: Legendary or ascended progression target with owned value, missing cost, and completion percent.

entity_axis.name: ProgressionAdvice
entity_axis.meaning: Ranked actions and weekly plan derived from account, economy, goals, and builds.

entity_axis.name: OntologyObject
entity_axis.meaning: Base ontology entity with class, properties, QA status, and privacy scope.

entity_axis.name: account_snapshot
entity_axis.meaning: Point-in-time account data snapshot in the ontology graph.

entity_axis.name: account_asset
entity_axis.meaning: An item holding owned by an account in the ontology graph.

entity_axis.name: legendary_goal
entity_axis.meaning: A tracked legendary goal (active/paused/completed) in the ontology.

entity_axis.name: goal_requirement
entity_axis.meaning: A material/currency/achievement required by a goal in the ontology.

entity_axis.name: reserved_asset
entity_axis.meaning: An asset quantity reserved for a specific goal.

entity_axis.name: safe_surplus
entity_axis.meaning: Computed safe-to-sell quantity for an asset.

entity_axis.name: guild_workspace
entity_axis.meaning: A guild workspace with members and shared goals.

entity_axis.name: guild_member
entity_axis.meaning: A member of a guild workspace.

constraint_axis.logic: API key must be present, at least 8 characters, and match hex/dash validation where enforced.
Account-bound items must not be counted as liquid trading-post sell value.
Net sell value applies the trading-post fee model before professional recommendations are made.
Recursive recipe expansion must guard against cycles.
Build readiness depends on fetched account professions and parsed gear requirements.
No API keys or session tokens in report data.
Snapshot must be less than 48h old for reports.

strengths: Complete asset ingestion and valuation loop.
Crafting and recipe planning is modeled beyond flat cost lookup.
Build readiness, legendary goals, TP signals, and coach plans are connected into a decision layer.
Broad automated tests exist across API, services, valuation, crafting, goals, and v4/v5 decision logic.
risks: Runtime route registration can drift from indexed flows if route-map checks are not part of CI.
Rate limiting and middleware need explicit test-mode isolation.
API response shape contracts are not yet captured by GitNexus shape_check.
Professional trust signals need richer provenance: price timestamp, source, liquidity confidence, build source version, and time-gated material explanation.
Ontology layer was historically disconnected from runtime (P0 fixed in this patch).
Ontology persistence was in-memory only (P0 fixed in this patch).
QA gate regex previously over-matched session tokens as API keys (P1 fixed in this patch).
next_stages: Stabilize runtime/API contract and CI checks.
Add professional trust metadata to every recommendation.
Turn semantic graph into an enforced contract for entities, states, and response shapes.
Improve user-facing workflows for advanced GW2 planning: raids/fractals/WvW/PvP, legendary time gates, and guild/account portfolio analysis.
Enforce ontology QA gate before report publication and strong recommendations.
Run semantic_graph.json generation in CI to prevent drift.
